title: Literature review on engineering surface modeling
author: Ma, Li
description: Review Highlights•The history of the development of the major models is sorted out.•The papers from the last two years are in focus.•The future directions of development are prospected.

steps_raw.title: Methodology
steps_raw.instruction: Any reconstruction method has to target a set of topographic statistical parameters, and the specified topographic parameters are used as reconstruction targets. The classical random field reconstruction model considers that the topography can be completely determined by the height distribution and autocorrelation function, so the goal is to reconstruct the surface with the specified height distribution parameters and autocorrelation function.
